      Fields in com.mot.rfid.api3 declared as TAG_FIELD 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      static TAG_FIELD TAG_FIELD.ALL_TAG_FIELDS
      Fetch all fields
      static TAG_FIELD TAG_FIELD.ANTENNA_ID
      Fetch AntennaID on which Tag was found from Reader
      static TAG_FIELD TAG_FIELD.BRAND_CHECK_STATUS
      Fetch the brand ID check status field
      static TAG_FIELD TAG_FIELD.CHANNEL_INDEX
      Fetch the Channel Index on which the Tag was found
      static TAG_FIELD TAG_FIELD.CRC
      Fetch Tag's CRC field from Reader
      static TAG_FIELD TAG_FIELD.FIRST_SEEN_TIME_STAMP
      Fetch Tag's First Seen Time Stamp from Reader
      static TAG_FIELD TAG_FIELD.GPS_COORDINATES
      Fetch the Fetch the GPS Location of the tag
      static TAG_FIELD TAG_FIELD.LAST_SEEN_TIME_STAMP
      Fetch Tag's Last Seen Time Stamp from Reader
      static TAG_FIELD TAG_FIELD.PC
      Fetch Tag's PC field from Reader
      static TAG_FIELD TAG_FIELD.PEAK_RSSI
      Fetch RSSI of the tag from Reader
      static TAG_FIELD TAG_FIELD.PHASE_INFO
      Received Tag Phase information
      static TAG_FIELD TAG_FIELD.TAG_SEEN_COUNT
      Fetch Tag Seen Count of the tag from Reader
      static TAG_FIELD TAG_FIELD.XPC
      Fetch Tag's XPC field from Reader

      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static TAG_FIELD[] TAG_FIELD.getTagField​(int value)  
      TAG_FIELD[] TagStorageSettings.getTagFields()
      Selects the content of TagData which inturn specifies whether certain fields are required to be processed by the Reader/Dll.

      Selects the content of TagData which inturn specifies whether certain fields are required to be processed by the Reader/Dll.
